description: Initial screen state: dark background with white text instructions for screen sharing.
frame_description: A dark screen with text: 'Great. To start, please click the "Share" button in the Meet call controls and choose to share this window.'

description: The task scenario text is typed out on the screen, describing a holiday planning task from the Sunshine Coast to London.
frame_description: The screen updates with a long block of text detailing the user's task to plan a holiday to London.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to start the task.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button in the center of the screen at the moment of the click.

description: The page navigates from the instruction screen to the Google homepage.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the dark instruction page to the white Google homepage.

description: The Google homepage is fully loaded.
frame_description: The Google homepage is displayed with the search bar and logo visible.

description: User clicks on the Google search bar.
frame_description: The cursor is inside the Google search input field at the moment of the click.

description: The page navigates back to the instruction screen.
frame_description: The screen quickly transitions from Google back to the dark instruction screen.

description: The instruction screen is visible with a reminder to think aloud and a 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
frame_description: The dark screen is visible with the text: 'Please remember to think aloud as you work through the task, and let me know when you feel you've completed it.'

description: User clicks the 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button at the moment of the click.

description: The text 'What are you thinking right now?' is typed out on the screen.
frame_description: The screen updates with the question: 'What are you thinking right now?'

description: User types the first part of their response into the thought box: 'I can. Imagine you're living on the Sunshine Coast in Queensland and you're'.
interaction_target: What are you thinking right now?
frame_description: Initial screen with a text prompt and a text area where the user is typing.

description: Navigation to the Google search results page.
frame_description: Google search results page.

description: User types 'skyscanner' into the Google search bar.
frame_description: Google search bar with text being entered.

description: Google search suggestions dropdown appears.
frame_description: Google search bar with a list of suggestions.

description: User clicks the search button in the Google search bar.
frame_description: Cursor over the search button in the Google search bar.

description: User hovers over the Skyscanner link in the search results.
interaction_target: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: Search results page with cursor over the first result.

description: User clicks the Skyscanner link.
interaction_target: Skyscanner | Find the cheapest flights fast
frame_description: Cursor clicking the Skyscanner link.

description: Skyscanner loading screen appears.
frame_description: Dark blue screen with a white Skyscanner logo in the center.

description: User continues typing a long response into the thought box, transcribing the task instructions.
interaction_target: What are you thinking right now?
frame_description: Thought box screen with a large amount of text being entered.

description: Navigation to the Skyscanner homepage.
page_title: Skyscanner | Compare Cheap Flights, Hotels & Car Hire
frame_description: Skyscanner homepage with flight search options.

description: User hovers over the 'From' location field.
page_title: Skyscanner | Compare Cheap Flights, Hotels & Car Hire
frame_description: Skyscanner homepage, cursor over the origin airport field.

description: User clicks on the 'From' input field to change the departure city.
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is visible with the search form in the center. The cursor is positioned over the 'From' field.

description: A dropdown menu with location suggestions appears below the 'From' field.
frame_description: A dropdown list is now visible under the 'From' input field.

description: User types 'sun' into the origin search box.
frame_description: The text 'sun' is being entered into the 'From' input field.

description: The autocomplete suggestions update to show locations matching 'sun'.
frame_description: The dropdown list now shows 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' and other related results.

description: User selects 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' from the autocomplete dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' option in the dropdown list.

description: The 'From' field updates to 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' and the dropdown closes.
frame_description: The search form now shows 'Sunshine Coast (MCY)' in the 'From' field.

description: User hovers over the 'To' input field.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'To' input field.

description: A full-screen overlay from the testing tool appears with a prompt.
frame_description: The screen is black with white text: 'Yes, please think aloud as you go. What are you looking at right now?'

description: User clicks on the 'To' input field.
frame_description: The Skyscanner homepage is visible again. The cursor clicks the 'To' field.

description: A dropdown menu with destination suggestions appears.
frame_description: A dropdown list of London airports is visible under the 'To' field.

description: User types 'lon' into the destination search box.
frame_description: The text 'lon' is entered into the 'To' input field.

description: The autocomplete suggestions update to show results matching 'lon'.
frame_description: The dropdown list updates to show 'London (Any)' and other London-related options.

description: User selects 'London (Any)' from the autocomplete dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'London (Any)' option in the dropdown list.

description: The 'To' field updates to 'London (Any)' and the dropdown closes.
frame_description: The search form now shows 'London (Any)' in the 'To' field.

description: User clicks the 'Search' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'Search' button.

description: A loading spinner appears as the search results begin to load.
frame_description: A small loading spinner is visible at the top center of the page.

description: The page navigates to the flight search results page.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the homepage to a results page with skeleton loaders, then finally to the list of flight options.

description: User scrolls down through the list of flight results.

description: Hover over the 'Select' button for the first flight result

description: Click the 'Select' button for the first flight result
frame_description: The 'Select' button is activated by the user's click.

description: Flight result card expands to show more details

description: Scroll back up the flight results list
frame_description: The page content moves downwards as the user scrolls up.

description: Uncheck the '2+ stops' filter
frame_description: The checkbox for '2+ stops' is unchecked.

frame_description: A semi-transparent overlay with the text 'Searching...' covers the results area.

description: Results update to show no flights found

description: Re-check the '2+ stops' filter
frame_description: The checkbox for '2+ stops' is checked again.

description: Flight results are restored

frame_description: The user is scrolling down the page.
